perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a title graphic for the Audi Q6 e-tron featuring influencer Chi-Chi. She is seen walking toward a gray Audi Q6 e-tron at a charging station. (2) She carries multiple brown paper grocery bags, smiling and looking energetic. (3) At the back of the car, she performs a kick gesture under the bumper to trigger the hands-free tailgate, which opens to reveal the trunk. (4) She loads her bags into the trunk and then plugs the charging cable into the car's side port. (5) Inside the car, she uses the digital touchscreen and dashboard. She begins eating a chocolate donut with a satisfied expression. (6) A close-up of the dashboard shows the battery charging from 10% to 51%. (7) The scene shifts to a driving montage, showing the car traveling over bridges, through tunnels, and past green highway signs. (8) She arrives at a local outdoor eatery with a large red 'Chicken Rice' sign and sits down to eat. (9) Realizing she forgot to lock the car, she pulls out her smartphone to use the myAudi app, causing the car's lights to blink in the background. (10) The video ends with a shot of her eating happily and a final Audi brand logo card.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat synth-pop music starts immediately and continues throughout. (2) A female voice speaks in an excited and friendly Mandarin tone, narrating her experience. (3) Mechanical sound effects are heard for the car's trunk opening and the charging plug clicking into place. (4) The music remains the primary layer as she describes the fast charging time. (5) Soft chewing and crunching sounds occur while she eats the donut. (6) Ambient road and engine sounds are kept very low during the driving sequence. (7) A 'chirp' or lock sound effect is synchronized with her phone app interaction at the restaurant. (8) The background music reaches a crescendo and ends with a professional logo chime.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Audi Q6 e-tron 充 10 min 自我 feat. 美食水水 千千' - Intro title. (2) '用 10 分鐘讓味蕾與心靈同步充電' - Hook text about recharging. (3) '尾門感應啟閉功能（附指示燈）' - Explaining the trunk feature. (4) '充電 10 分鐘 續航里程可達 255 km' - Highlighting the charging efficiency. (5) 'myAudi app 可遠端上鎖或解鎖車輛' - Explaining the remote lock feature. (6) Various road signs in Traditional Chinese indicating directions to Chiayi, Nantou, and Fengyuan. (7) Subtitles in both Chinese and English throughout translating the spoken dialogue.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Loading/Charging -> Eating/Waiting -> Driving Montage -> Arrival/Remote Lock -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female influencer throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with her hair in a high bun, wearing a white sleeveless top under a gray/denim overall dress and silver necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A mix of modern urban parking spaces with EV chargers, city streets with residential buildings, expansive highway systems, and a traditional Taiwanese street-side eatery.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Journey -> Convenience -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a lifestyle-oriented commercial for the Audi Q6 e-tron. It leverages a popular food influencer to showcase the car's practical features—such as fast charging, hands-free trunk, and remote app control—positioning the vehicle as a perfect companion for a spontaneous and modern lifestyle.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Influencer '美食水水 千千' is explicitly featured as the presenter using the product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Chi-Chi's signature food-centric lifestyle and cheerful personality.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges high-tech automotive features with everyday relatable needs like grocery shopping and eating out.
